TEMPERATURE  
THE FIRST WORD OF YOUR RESPONSE SHOULD BE THE WORD TEMPERATURE.  
THE LETTER S SHOULD APPEAR AT LEAST 13 TIMES.  
THE ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS.  
INCLUDE KEYWORD ROLL IN THE 12-TH SENTENCE, AS THE 2-TH WORD OF THAT SENTENCE.  
ROLL IS A KEYWORD IN THE 12-TH SENTENCE.  
THE LETTER S APPEARS 13 TIMES IN THE RESPONSE.  
THE RESPONSE IS IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS.  
THE KEYWORD ROLL IS USED IN THE 12-TH SENTENCE.  
THE RESPONSE MEETS ALL THE REQUIREMENTS.  
PLAYER
